front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — documentation-currency + disposition change over the CT6 plugin's non-instruction doc corpus (markdown + a JSON run-artifact ledger + tool-driven OpenSpec archival). No frontend/backend runs at build time; there is no UI/API surface. Recorded authorizations: Playwright N/A (no runnable UI in this change) and dev-API integration N/A (no service endpoint touched) — the verification surface is the widened independent documentation-currency audit + `openspec validate --all --strict` + the full pytest suite under both encodings.

scenarios: ledger covers 100% of the in-scope set with class totals
every entry carries a fixed-vocabulary verdict plus evidence
excluded classes are enumerated with reasons
acceptance_criteria: .architect-team/doc-disposition/ledger.json assigns every in-scope tracked doc (22 flat + 49 living specs + 12 non-archived change docs = 83) exactly one verdict in {current,updated,frozen-historical,archived,current-in-flight} with evidence; class totals stated; excluded classes (109 instruction / 193 archive / 10 dot-dir) enumerated with reasons; in-scope + excluded reconciles to the full tracked *.md count (395)

unit: reconciliation of ledger totals against `git ls-files '*.md'` (documented in the ledger header; verified by the Group-E widened audit)

scenarios: each inventory doc receives a verdict
inventory version and count claims match the corpus
acceptance_criteria: the 7 gated inventory docs (README, CHANGELOG, CLAUDE, CODEBASE_MAP, INTEGRATION_MAP, phenotypes/README, phenotypes/SCHEMA) are re-verified against HEAD (not rebuilt); maps satisfied-by-Phase−1 with evidence ref; drift fixed in place; version/test/inventory-count claims consistent

scenarios: each non-inventory flat doc gets a verdict
historical superpowers docs are frozen, not rewritten
acceptance_criteria: all 15 non-inventory flat docs verdicted (INSTRUCTION_COMPLIANCE_RUBRIC, LINEAGE_UPGRADE_REQUIREMENTS, services/README, services/SEPARATION_MANIFEST, 4 phenotype blueprints, 7 superpowers historical); drifted-current updated in place; the 7 superpowers docs frozen-historical with at most a one-line header, dated bodies never rewritten

unit: the Group-E widened audit walk over the 15 non-inventory flat docs

entries.spec_requirement_id: documentation-currency-refresh/OpenSpec documentation pass with tool-based archival
scenarios: the three shipped changes are archived via the tool
validation is green after each archive
the immutable archive tree is untouched
acceptance_criteria: all 49 living specs + 12 non-archived change docs verdicted; consolidate-duplicated-rules / exploration-pipeline / librarian-installable archived via `openspec archive <change> -y`; `openspec validate --all --strict` exits 0 after EACH; living-spec count 49→52; no pre-existing openspec/changes/archive/** file hand-edited

unit: `openspec validate --all --strict` (exit 0 after each archive; the tool-native gate)

scenarios: every archived file is reachable via the archive index
acceptance_criteria: docs/archive/INDEX.md exists (present even if empty); every stale non-historical flat doc git mv'd into docs/archive/ with an index entry (original path + reason); git log --follow traces each move; no tracked doc removed without a git mv destination; every file under docs/archive/ except INDEX.md has an index entry

unit: git diff inspection: no delete without a git mv destination (verified in the Group-E audit + the suite run)

entries.spec_requirement_id: documentation-currency-refresh/Widened independent audit and green suite
scenarios: the widened audit returns PASS over the full set
the suite stays green under both encodings
acceptance_criteria: the independent (producer≠checker) system-architect Documentation Currency Audit, widened to the full expanded in-scope set, returns PASS with its walked-file list matching the ledger; version/test/file/inventory counts consistent corpus-wide (post-archive state); full pytest suite green under cp1252 AND PYTHONUTF8=1; openspec validate --all --strict green; any sanctioned-move-altered pin updated in this change
